questions.question_text: When you 'savor' your morning coffee, you are fully enjoying its taste. What does 'savor' mean?

options.text: To prepare and brew a drink carefully before consuming it
To drink something very quickly without paying attention to it
To taste and enjoy something slowly, appreciating its qualities
To share food or drink generously with friends and family

questions.explanation_ar: savor تعني يتذوق بتمعّن ويستمتع، أي الاستمتاع الكامل بطعم أو رائحة شيء ما بشكل بطيء ومدروس.

questions.question_text: Coffee has become one of the world's most 'influential' beverages. What does 'influential' mean?

options.text: Having the power to affect and shape people's beliefs and behaviour
Being consumed in very large quantities by people worldwide
Having a strong and pleasant flavour that many people prefer
Being produced in the greatest number of countries globally

questions.explanation_ar: influential تعني مؤثّر وذو تأثير واسع، أي أن الشيء يمتلك القدرة على التأثير في آراء الناس وسلوكياتهم.

questions.question_text: Coffee rituals 'transcend' geographical boundaries and cultural differences. What does 'transcend' mean?

options.text: To strengthen and reinforce existing cultural boundaries
To go beyond and rise above ordinary limits or divisions
To create and establish new boundaries in different cultures
To replace and eliminate one culture with another entirely

questions.explanation_ar: transcend تعني يتخطى ويتجاوز، أي القدرة على تجاوز الحدود والقيود المعتادة والارتفاع فوقها.

questions.question_text: European traders were initially 'skeptical' about coffee. What does 'skeptical' mean?

options.text: Extremely excited and eager to try something new immediately
Completely certain and confident about the value of something
Doubtful and unwilling to believe in something without good evidence
Afraid and nervous about the potential dangers of something new

questions.explanation_ar: skeptical تعني متشكّك وغير مقتنع، أي الشعور بالشك وعدم الاستعداد للتصديق دون وجود أدلة كافية.

questions.question_text: Early European coffee houses were 'vibrant' social centres. What does 'vibrant' mean?

options.text: Quiet and calm, providing a peaceful place for relaxation
Full of energy, activity, and a lively atmosphere
Exclusive and accessible only to wealthy members of society
Temporary and existing for only a short period of time

questions.explanation_ar: vibrant تعني نابض بالحياة ومليء بالحيوية، أي أن المكان أو الأجواء تمتاز بالنشاط والحيوية الملحوظة.

questions.question_text: When intellectuals would 'gather' at coffee houses, it means they came together in the same place for a shared purpose.
questions.explanation_ar: صحيح. gather تعني يتجمع ويلتقي، أي اجتماع أشخاص في مكان واحد لغرض مشترك.

questions.question_text: A 'distinctive' coffee tradition is one that is very common and nearly identical to traditions in all other countries.
questions.explanation_ar: خطأ. distinctive تعني مميّز وفريد، أي أن التقليد يتميز بخصائص واضحة تجعله مختلفاً ومعروفاً، وليس مجرد نسخة من تقاليد أخرى.

questions.question_text: The coffee ceremony has _____ over centuries from a simple drink preparation into an elaborate cultural ritual.
questions.explanation_ar: evolved تعني تطوّر بشكل تدريجي، وتُستخدم للتعبير عن التحوّل البطيء الذي يطرأ على شيء ما عبر الزمن.

questions.question_text: Which sentence is written in the passive voice (present)?

options.text: Ethiopian farmers grow the finest coffee beans in the world.
Baristas prepare espresso shots with great care and skill.
The finest coffee beans are grown by Ethiopian farmers.
Many people drink coffee every morning before they start work.

questions.explanation_ar: الجملة المبنية للمجهول تُركّز على الفعل وليس الفاعل، وتُكوَّن بـ is/are + تصريف ثالث. الخيار c هو الوحيد بهذه الصيغة.

questions.question_text: Complete: 'Espresso _____ in small cups at Italian neighborhood bars every day.'

options.text: serves
is served
was served
serving

questions.explanation_ar: تُكوَّن صيغة المبني للمجهول في المضارع البسيط بـ is/are + تصريف ثالث. المفرد 'espresso' يستلزم is served.

questions.question_text: Why is passive voice used in 'Coffee is enjoyed by millions of people around the world'?

options.text: Because the action is in the past and has already finished
Because we want to emphasize the coffee as the main focus
Because 'millions of people' cannot be used as a subject
Because it is grammatically incorrect in the active voice

questions.explanation_ar: نستخدم المبني للمجهول لتركيز الاهتمام على ما تم (القهوة) بدلاً من مَن يفعله (الملايين). الفاعل يظل مذكوراً بعد by لكن ليس في موضع التركيز.

questions.question_text: Which sentence correctly uses the present passive when the doer is unknown?

options.text: Coffee is sold at markets, but we don't know who sells it.
Coffee beans are harvested by someone every year somewhere.
Coffee is grown in many countries around the equator.
Coffee beans are going to picked and processed in the farms.

questions.explanation_ar: يُستخدم المبني للمجهول حين لا نعرف الفاعل أو حين يكون غير مهم. الخيار c صحيح لأنه لا يذكر فاعلاً محدداً ويُركّز على فعل الزراعة ذاته.

questions.question_text: 'Coffee ceremonies are held in Ethiopia to celebrate special family occasions' is a correct present passive sentence.
questions.explanation_ar: صحيح. are held هي صيغة المبني للمجهول الصحيحة (are + تصريف ثالث)، والجملة تُركّز على الحفلات وليس على مَن ينظّمها.

questions.question_text: Match each active sentence to its correct present passive equivalent.

left_items: Baristas prepare coffee with great skill.
Farmers grow coffee in the coffee belt.
People drink millions of cups daily.
Roasters select the finest beans carefully.
right_items: Millions of cups are drunk daily.
Coffee is prepared with great skill.
Coffee is grown in the coffee belt.
The finest beans are selected carefully.

correct_answer.left: Baristas prepare coffee with great skill.
correct_answer.right: Coffee is prepared with great skill.

correct_answer.left: Farmers grow coffee in the coffee belt.
correct_answer.right: Coffee is grown in the coffee belt.

correct_answer.left: People drink millions of cups daily.
correct_answer.right: Millions of cups are drunk daily.

correct_answer.left: Roasters select the finest beans carefully.
correct_answer.right: The finest beans are selected carefully.

questions.explanation_ar: في تحويل الجملة من المبني للمعلوم للمجهول: المفعول به يصبح الفاعل، ويُستخدم is/are + تصريف ثالث، والفاعل الأصلي يُحذف أو يُذكر بعد by.

questions.question_text: According to Passage A, what is the legendary origin of coffee's discovery in Ethiopia?

options.text: A trader discovered it while crossing the Sahara desert
A goat herder noticed his animals becoming energetic after eating certain berries
A scientist studying plants found that coffee beans had medical benefits
Monks in an Ethiopian monastery used it to stay awake during prayers

questions.explanation_ar: تذكر الأسطورة الواردة في النص أن راعي ماعز لاحظ نشاطاً غير عادياً في قطيعه بعد أكل التوت في إثيوبيا، مما أدى إلى اكتشاف القهوة.

questions.question_text: According to Passage A, through what region did coffee spread before reaching Europe?

options.text: The Roman Empire and Mediterranean trade routes
The Silk Road across Central Asia
The Ottoman Empire
The Persian Gulf and Indian Ocean trade network

questions.explanation_ar: ذكر النص أن القهوة انتشرت عبر الإمبراطورية العثمانية ثم وصلت في النهاية إلى أوروبا في القرن السابع عشر.

questions.question_text: Passage A describes the Italian espresso culture as emphasizing 'quick, standing consumption at neighborhood bars.' What does this suggest about Italian coffee culture?

options.text: Italians prefer to avoid socialising while drinking coffee
Coffee in Italy is primarily consumed as a medicinal health drink
Italian coffee culture values brief social interactions as part of daily routines
Italian cafés are too crowded to provide seating for their customers

questions.explanation_ar: تُضمّن هذه العبارة أن ثقافة الإسبريسو الإيطالية تُقدّر التفاعل الاجتماعي الموجز والسريع كجزء طبيعي من الروتين اليومي.

questions.question_text: According to Passage A, Scandinavian countries have embraced the concept of 'fika' as a coffee break focused on relaxation and community.
questions.explanation_ar: صحيح. وصف النص أن دول الشمال الأوروبي تبنّت مفهوم 'فيكا' وهو استراحة قهوة تُعطي الأولوية للاسترخاء والتواصل الاجتماعي على حساب الإنتاجية.

questions.question_text: According to Passage A, coffee reached Europe in the _____ century after spreading through the Ottoman Empire.
questions.explanation_ar: ذكر النص أن القهوة وصلت إلى أوروبا في القرن السابع عشر بعد انتشارها عبر الإمبراطورية العثمانية.

questions.question_text: Match each culture or region from Passage A to its distinctive coffee tradition.

right_items: elaborate preparation rituals lasting several hours for family gatherings
treats coffee preparation as an art form with baristas as craftspeople
quick espresso consumed while standing at neighborhood bars
fika — a coffee break prioritising relaxation and community bonding

correct_answer.right: quick espresso consumed while standing at neighborhood bars
fika — a coffee break prioritising relaxation and community bonding
elaborate preparation rituals lasting several hours for family gatherings
treats coffee preparation as an art form with baristas as craftspeople

questions.explanation_ar: وصف النص أربع ثقافات قهوة مميزة: إيطاليا (سرعة وبساطة)، الشمال الأوروبي (فيكا للاسترخاء)، إثيوبيا (طقوس معقدة)، وثقافة الموجة الثالثة (القهوة كفن).
